extracted.title: Bobcat Storage Conditions for 04/11/2026
extracted.description:
The following restrictions will be in place on the Bobcat Gas Storage (Bobcat) system for Gas Day April 11, 2026:

Bobcat has restricted a portion of excess injection nominations. No increases in injection nominations will be accepted except to comply with NAESB bump guidelines.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
